commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=0cbc2f617406a0f051f0c48018b1e3dc98dcdecb)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a doctor legacy-config migration and unit tests to repair DeepSeek V4 Flash contextWindow values to 1,000,000.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: the proposed migration changes any finite non-1M DeepSeek V4 Flash contextWindow, while current DeepSeek normalization preserves explicit overrides. I did not run tests because this is a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The PR needs a contributor code revision and real behavior proof before normal maintainer review; automation cannot provide the contributor's real setup proof.

target.title: fix(doctor): repair stale contextWindow for DeepSeek V4 Flash
target.body:
## Summary

Repairs stale `contextWindow` values for DeepSeek V4 Flash during `openclaw doctor --fix`.

## Problem

Older OpenClaw releases configured `deepseek-v4-flash` with `contextWindow: 200000` (200K), but the official DeepSeek V4 Flash context window is 1,000,000 (1M).

When users switch from a smaller-context model (e.g., MiniMax M2.7 at 204.8K) to DeepSeek V4 Flash, the progress bar shows ~50% instead of ~10% because the stale config value overrides the catalog default.

## Fix

| File | Changes |
|------|---------|
| `src/commands/doctor/shared/legacy-config-migrations.runtime.models.ts` | +42 | New `contextWindow-stale` migration |
| `src/commands/doctor/shared/legacy-config-migrations.runtime.models.test.ts` | +163 | 7 unit tests |

- Detects deepseek-v4-flash models with incorrect 200K contextWindow
- Repairs to 1M to match catalog default
- Handles both bare (`deepseek-v4-flash`) and provider-prefixed (`deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash`) model IDs
- 7 unit tests covering repair, passthrough, edge cases

## Before / After

| Scenario | Before | After |
|----------|--------|-------|
| User config: 200K | ❌ Incorrect | ✅ Repaired to 1M |
| User config: 1M | ✅ No change | ✅ No change |
| Non-stale models | ✅ No change | ✅ No change |

Fixes: #85834
target.author: linux2010
